about.title: About Yakiben
about.content: Yakiben is a modern restaurant system designed to empower small business owners by reducing costs and providing modular, easy-to-use tools.

entries.title: Save Costs
entries.description: Reduce commission fees to just 1-3% compared to 30-40% charged by mainstream apps.
entries.details: This graph shows the cost benefits of using Yakiben compared to competitors.

entries.title: Operational Costs
entries.description: Highlight reduced operational costs with Yakiben.
entries.details: This graph highlights the reduced operational costs with Yakiben.

entries.title: Easy Management
entries.description: Manage your menu, orders, and promotions effortlessly with our admin panel.
entries.details: Screenshot of the customer app showcasing its user-friendly interface.

entries.title: Order Management
entries.description: Seamless operations with our order management app.
entries.details: Screenshot of the order management app for seamless operations.

entries.title: Your Own Branding
entries.description: Promote your restaurant directly to customers without relying on third-party apps.
entries.details: Promote your restaurant with personalized branding options.

entries.title: Showcase Identity
entries.description: Showcase your unique identity with Yakiben's branding tools.
entries.details: Showcase your unique identity with Yakiben's branding tools.

entries.title: Modular System
entries.description: Quickly set up a system tailored to your restaurant's needs with our modular design.

entries.title: Customizable Features
entries.description: Adapt Yakiben to your specific requirements with ease.

entries.title: Scalable Design
entries.description: Easily scale your restaurant operations with Yakiben's flexible and scalable design.
entries.details: Illustration of Yakiben's scalable design enabling restaurant growth.

entries.title: Integrated Ecosystem
entries.description: Experience seamless integration of tools and features for a unified restaurant management system.
entries.details: Illustration of Yakiben's integrated ecosystem connecting all restaurant operations.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.content: Our pricing is simple and transparent. Pay only for hosting and managing resources with a variable monthly cost. 0% per order, no hidden fees.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: Have questions or want to get started? Reach out to us at @ashok314 (https://ashok314.github.io/)

value.title: Our Philosophy
value.content: We believe in returning the hard work of small business owners by providing tools that require minimal effort and deliver maximum impact.

announcement.text: Explore our customer app for more features and benefits!

footerNote: * Some images are AI-generated. Data in graphs are accurate as of July 2025.
